title: otholobium obliquum
intro: Otholobium obliquum, a species of flowering plant in the legume family, is commonly known as the "uneven pea." This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in South Africa, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits associated with Otholobium obliquum include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Otholobium obliquum are typically made by infusing the leaves or roots in hot water to create teas or decoctions.
